task: Launch-quality advanced task: Merger Filing Data-Room Consistency Audit. Reconcile inconsistent market-share exhibits and produce a decision-ready workbook and concise technical memo. Use only the embedded packet provided. Mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review. Construct a decision table with baseline, mitigated, and sensitivity cases; ensure any recommended action stays inside the decision budget and improves the controlling metric by at least 10%. Preserve intermediate calculations and record-level citations, include validation checks and sensitivity notes. Deliver merger_dataroom_audit.xlsx and counsel_packet.md with reproducible formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
